description: You are using Aerobridge, an open-source drone/UAV fleet management system (admin login: http://localhost:8000/admin/, username: admin, password: adminpass123). The drone operator company 'Electric Inspection' is expanding its service offering and needs its compliance profile updated. Update the 'Electric Inspection' operator record by adding 'videotaping' to its Authorized Activities, adding 'SORA' to its Operational Authorizations, and changing its Operator Type to 'Non-LUC'. Save all changes.
